Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary
Concepts
Buffer Fundamentals Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer Nokia SR (FP4/FP5) Nokia Access/Agg

Arista 7050X

The Arista 7050X is built on the Broadcom Trident II (BCM56850) ASIC — the first 32×40G switch from Arista.

Field Value
Ports 32 QSFP
RX Queues 8Q
Total Buffer 12 MB
TX Buffer (max to 1 port) Dynamic up to 8 MB

Buffer Details

The Trident II has 12 MB of on-chip packet buffer. The memory is split between dedicated per-port buffers and a dynamic shared pool. Most of the memory is in the shared pool. A single congested port can absorb up to 8 MB of the shared pool dynamically.

See the Trident II architecture page for more details.

References

  • Arista 7050X Architecture Notes

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
